caption: A news broadcast features a man in a white shirt and glasses, identified as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" by on-screen text, being interviewed by multiple people holding microphones. He is surrounded by other men, including one wearing a dark jacket and glasses. The scene takes place indoors with a neutral background. A red banner at the top of the screen displays the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. Smaller text identifies other individuals as "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी." A timer at the bottom right indicates the time is "10:04 PM." As the sequence progresses, the camera slightly shifts, and the man in the white shirt continues to speak into the microphones, gesturing slightly with his hand. A small red text box with the word "सा" appears in the bottom left corner during the final segment.
